particulars.description: Part of the freehold land known as 58 langdon road, poole BH14 9EH registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number DT132024 as the same is comprised in a transfer of part between regal homes south LTD (1) and the borrower (2) on or about the date of this deed.. Part of the freehold land known as 60 langdon road, parkstone, poole BH14 9EH registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number DT395453 as the same is comprised in a transfer of part between regal homes south LTD (1) and the borrower (2) on or about the date of this deed.. Title number: to be allocated out of DT132024 and DT395453 (respectively).
